message:
refactor(sync): import reordering, pool wait tracking, gf2 while-let

Housekeeping pass across sync primitives and related modules:

Import reordering (parking_lot first, then std):
  - sync/mutex.rs, sync/notify.rs, sync/rwlock.rs, sync/semaphore.rs,
    runtime/scheduler/global_injector.rs: move parking_lot imports above
    std imports for consistency with Rust convention (external before std)

sync/mutex.rs: simplify waiters() — remove .expect("mutex state lock
  poisoned") chain since parking_lot::Mutex never poisons

sync/semaphore.rs: collapse multi-line .lock() call in AcquireFuture::drop

sync/pool.rs: add record_wait_time() method to GenericPool
  - Tracks cumulative wait duration in PoolState::total_wait_time for
    blocked acquire operations
  - Skips zero-duration waits to avoid noise
  - Integrates with optional metrics recorder when feature="metrics"
  - Calls record_wait_time at acquire sites with Instant-based timing
  - New test: record_wait_time_accumulates_in_pool_stats

trace/gf2.rs: replace loop+break with while-let in BoundaryMatrix::reduce
  column pivot iteration — semantically identical, more idiomatic
  - New test: reduce_keeps_zero_column_zero

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
